시편 83:1.content: God, don’t keep silent. Don’t keep silent, and don’t be still, God.

시편 83:2.content: For, behold, your enemies are stirred up. Those who hate you have lifted up their heads.

시편 83:3.content: They conspire with cunning against your people. They plot against your cherished ones.

시편 83:4.content: “Come,” they say, “let’s destroy them as a nation, that the name of Israel may be remembered no more.”

시편 83:5.content: For they have conspired together with one mind. They form an alliance against you.

시편 83:6.content: The tents of Edom and the Ishmaelites; Moab, and the Hagrites;

시편 83:7.content: Gebal, Ammon, and Amalek; Philistia with the inhabitants of Tyre;

시편 83:8.content: Assyria also is joined with them. They have helped the children of Lot.

시편 83:9.content: Do to them as you did to Midian, as to Sisera, as to Jabin, at the river Kishon;

시편 83:10.content: who perished at Endor, who became as dung for the earth.

시편 83:11.content: Make their nobles like Oreb and Zeeb, yes, all their princes like Zebah and Zalmunna,

시편 83:12.content: who said, “Let’s take possession of God’s pasture lands.”

시편 83:13.content: My God, make them like tumbleweed, like chaff before the wind.

시편 83:14.content: As the fire that burns the forest, as the flame that sets the mountains on fire,

시편 83:15.content: so pursue them with your tempest, and terrify them with your storm.

시편 83:16.content: Fill their faces with confusion, that they may seek your name, Yahweh.

시편 83:17.content: Let them be disappointed and dismayed forever. Yes, let them be confounded and perish;

시편 83:18.content: that they may know that you alone, whose name is Yahweh, are the Most High over all the earth.
